info.title: FoN API
info.description: API for the FoN (Fucks or Not) community voting platform. Upload images and links, vote on content, and discover what fucks.

post.description: Create a new account or authenticate an existing user

get.description: Verify if the current session is authenticated and get user info

post.description: End the current session and revoke the JWT token
Send a password reset email to the specified address
Set a new password using a reset token

message.example: Password has been reset successfully. You can now log in with your new password.

401.description: MFA verification required (mfaCode missing or invalid)

post.description: Change the password for the authenticated user
Initialize multi-factor authentication for the account
Complete MFA setup by verifying a TOTP code
Disable multi-factor authentication (requires current password and a valid MFA code)

400.description: Password is required to disable MFA

get.description: Get all API tokens for the authenticated user

post.description: Create a new API token for programmatic access

delete.description: Delete an API token to revoke access

post.description: Upload an image or submit a link for community voting

400.description: Invalid request (e.g. file too large, max 10MB; invalid upload_type; missing required fields)

post.description: Upload content using an API token instead of session cookie. Only `upload_type` values of `image` or `link` are supported here — `image_url` is not available on this endpoint and returns a 400 error.

400.description: Invalid request (e.g. unsupported upload_type, file too large, missing required fields)

get.description: Retrieve details for a specific upload

404.description: Upload not found (also returned if the upload exists but you're not the owner, to avoid confirming its existence)

patch.description: Toggle the privacy setting of an upload between public and private. This endpoint ignores the request body — calling it once toggles the current state, regardless of any body sent.

is_private.description: The upload's privacy state after the toggle

404.description: Upload not found, or you're not the owner (both return 404)

get.description: Get paginated list of all public uploads
Get uploads filtered by included tags
Get the 6 most recently uploaded items
Get the top 6 highest voted items. Takes no query parameters.

400.description: Invalid vote value, or invalid/inaccessible upload ID

429.description: Rate limit exceeded (30 votes per minute)

get.description: Get the authenticated user's vote on a specific upload

parameters.name: uploadId
parameters.description: The upload to check the current user's vote for

200.description: The user's vote on this upload, or null if they haven't voted

post.description: Vote on an upload without authentication (uses fingerprinting)

get.description: Get all tags with upload counts
Get all tags associated with an upload

post.description: Add tags to an upload. Tag names must be 2-50 characters and contain only letters, numbers, spaces, and hyphens.

tags.description: The full, updated list of tags on the upload

added.description: Number of tags newly added (already-present tags are skipped)

400.description: Tags array missing/empty/invalid, too many tags, or invalid tag names

get.description: Retrieve the full image for an upload

Cache-Control.description: public, max-age=31536000, immutable (1 year, immutable for public images) or private, no-store, must-revalidate (private images)

CDN-Cache-Control.description: public, max-age=31536000, immutable (1 year, immutable cache at the CDN edge for public images)

404.description: Image not found or access denied

get.description: Retrieve a smaller thumbnail version of an image. Thumbnails are always encoded as WebP.

parameters.name: size
parameters.description: Target thumbnail size in pixels, clamped to 50-400. Invalid or missing values fall back to 200.

Cache-Control.description: public, max-age=31536000, immutable (1 year, immutable for public uploads)

CDN-Cache-Control.description: public, max-age=31536000, immutable (1 year, immutable cache at the CDN edge for public uploads)

401.description: Private upload: no auth cookie/token present

403.description: Private upload: authenticated but not the owner (no admin override)

get.description: Get the authenticated user's profile data. The counts object is always included regardless of the type requested.

400.description: Invalid type value (must be uploads, votes, or counts)

get.description: Get public uploads from a specific user

parameters.name: tags
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of tag slugs to filter by

get.description: Get paginated list of all users (admin only)

post.description: Shadow ban a user (their votes no longer count)

mfaCode.description: Required if MFA is enabled on the account

otpauthUrl.description: otpauth:// URI for authenticator apps to configure TOTP automatically

backupCodes.description: 10 one-time backup codes formatted as XXXX-XXXX-XXXX-XXXX

stats.description: Computed vote statistics. Always present on GET /api/upload/{id} responses.

file.description: Image file (JPEG, PNG, GIF, WebP, max 10MB)

UploadCreated.description: The subset of upload fields returned immediately after creation. Fetch GET /api/upload/{id} for the full object including tags, username, and stats.

total.description: Total number of matching uploads. Present on /api/uploads/filtered.

Vote.description: Shape of vote entries returned in GET /api/profile?type=votes

counts.description: Always included in the response, regardless of the type query parameter.
